summary: Completed frontend testing of CLT Academy ERP redesigned login page and home page. All features working correctly - split layout login, trading chart background, logo animation, and centered home page logo.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Login page redesigned with split layout (logo left, form right on desktop), trading chart SVG background, and logo animation on successful login. Home page has CLT logo centered above welcome message with trading chart background at ~20% opacity. All data-testid attributes working: login-logo, login-email, login-password, login-submit, home-logo, home-launcher, section-icon-{id}.
